pages.name: Home
pages.description: Marketing-focused homepage that introduces the firm and routes users to key sections like portfolio, plans, services, blog, testimonials, and consultations.
primary_functions: Introduce the architecture and home building firm with a clear value proposition and hero imagery.
Provide prominent entry points to Portfolio, Plans, Services, Blog, Testimonials, and Contact/Consultation.
Highlight featured residential, renovation, and commercial projects for quick access.
Offer quick calls-to-action such as 'Schedule a Consultation' and 'Explore House Plans'.
Surface links to tools like the custom home cost calculator via a featured services section.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Our Work' or a primary CTA to browse all projects
Click 'Explore House Plans' CTA
Click 'Custom Home Design', 'Renovations', or 'Commercial' service teaser card
Click 'Insights' or a featured article section 'View all articles'
Click 'Client Stories' section 'Read more testimonials'
Click 'Schedule a Consultation' or 'Get in Touch' CTA
Click a featured project card in the hero or featured projects strip
Click a featured house plan card
Click a featured article card
Click a featured testimonial quote

access_methods.description: Main logo and 'Home' link in header

pages.name: Portfolio
pages.description: Filterable gallery of all built and renovated projects, including single-family homes, renovations, and commercial work.
primary_functions: Let users browse all projects with thumbnail cards that link to detailed project pages.
Filter projects by type (single-family_home, renovation, commercial, etc.), style (modern, traditional, etc.), and context (urban_infill, city_lot, etc.).
Filter projects by size range (square footage), number of rooms (e.g., kitchens), budget range, and completion year.
Sort project listings by cost (high_to_low, low_to_high), recency, or name.
Provide visual cues (badges or labels) for project categories like 'Renovation', 'Commercial', or 'Kitchen' to support task-based scanning.
Offer quick navigation back to the homepage or onward to related content (e.g., Plans or Services).

incoming_params.description: Optional project type preset (e.g., 'single_family_home', 'renovation', 'commercial') applied via updatePortfolioFilterState.
Optional style preset (e.g., 'modern') for filtering projects.
Optional primary space filter (e.g., 'kitchen') mapped to room_type in PortfolioFilterState.
Optional context preset (e.g., 'urban_infill', 'city_lot').
Optional minimum size (sq ft) filter applied to min_size_sq_ft.
Optional maximum size (sq ft) filter applied to max_size_sq_ft.
Optional minimum budget filter.
Optional maximum budget filter (e.g., 550000 for '$550,000').
Optional lower bound for completion year range filter.
Optional upper bound for completion year range filter.
Optional sort preset (e.g., 'cost_high_to_low', 'recency_new_to_old').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a project card in the portfolio grid
Click site logo or 'Back to Home'
Click contextual CTA like 'Looking for a ready-made plan?'
Click contextual CTA like 'See our custom home services'

access_methods.description: Direct URL access with optional query parameters to pre-set filters

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single project, including imagery, specs, budget, and calls-to-action for inquiries and quotes.
primary_functions: Display full project information including photos, floor plans (if relevant), size (sq ft), estimated cost/budget, style, type, completion year, and location.
Allow users to save the project to their favorites/saved list via an 'Add to Favorites' or 'Save Project' button.

Provide a 'Request a Similar Project' or 'Get a Quote for a Similar Renovation' form section for renovations (e.g., kitchen remodels) that captures name, phone, budget, project description, and preferred start date.
Provide an 'Ask About This Project' or 'Inquire' form section for any project, pre-filling the project name in the message to support investor-style inquiries.
Offer navigation controls such as 'Back to Portfolio' and links to related or similar projects (e.g., same type, style, or budget range).

incoming_params.description: Project slug used as projectSlug in getProjectDetail to load the selected project.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Portfolio' link
Click 'View all saved projects' after adding to favorites
Click a 'Similar project' thumbnail

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'slug' query parameter from listings or other deep links
Sharable URL to a specific project detail

pages.name: Plans
pages.description: Catalog of pre-designed house plans with filters to help users find suitable layouts and compare options.
primary_functions: List pre-designed home plans as cards showing key info such as bedrooms, bathrooms, size, and estimated build cost.
Filter plans by bedrooms (e.g., 3_bedrooms), bathrooms, maximum square footage, style (e.g., modern), and budget.
Sort plans by cost, size, and popularity to support comparison shopping.
Allow users to open detailed views of specific plans on the Plan Detail page.
Promote consultation calls-to-action like 'Need help choosing a plan? Schedule a Consultation' linking to relevant forms.

incoming_params.description: Optional exact bedroom count to filter plans (applied as min_bedrooms and max_bedrooms in PlanFilterState).
Optional maximum size preset for plan filtering.
Optional style preset (e.g., 'modern') for plan filtering.
Optional maximum estimated build cost for plans.
Optional sort preset (e.g., 'cost_low_to_high').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a plan card in the plans catalog
Click CTA 'Need help choosing a plan? Schedule a Consultation'
Click site logo to return home

access_methods.description: Direct access with optional query parameters to pre-set filters

pages.name: Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed information for a specific pre-designed house plan, including estimated costs and consultation request options.
primary_functions: Show detailed plan information including floor plans/diagrams, room counts, dimensions, style, and estimated build cost.
Allow users to save the plan to their favorites/saved list via a 'Save Plan' or 'Add to Favorites' button.
Enable users to start a plan-specific consultation using a 'Schedule Consultation' or 'Talk to an Architect' form section that collects name, email, and a customized message.
Clarify key comparisons such as how this plan differs from similar ones (e.g., cost, size, layout), supporting users in choosing the more affordable option.
Provide navigation back to the filtered plans list and show links to similar plans.

incoming_params.description: Plan slug used to load the specific plan via getPlanDetail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Plans' link
Click 'View all saved plans' after saving plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'slug' query parameter from plans listing or saved items
Sharable URL to a specific plan detail

pages.name: Services
pages.description: Overview of all services offered, including custom home design, renovations, and commercial architecture.
primary_functions: Present a clear list of services (e.g., Custom Home Design, Renovations & Remodels, Commercial Architecture) with brief descriptions.
Allow users to click through to a detailed service page (Service Detail) for deeper information.
Highlight key tools associated with services, such as the custom home cost calculator, with a link to the relevant service detail page.
Provide contextual calls-to-action to contact the firm or schedule a consultation related to a specific service area.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a specific service card (e.g., 'Custom Home Design')
Click 'See custom home projects' under the Custom Home Design service
Click 'See renovation projects' under the Renovations service
Click 'See commercial projects' under the Commercial Architecture service
Click 'Ask about this service' CTA

pages.name: Service Detail
pages.description: In-depth page for a single service such as Custom Home Design, including the interactive cost calculator and estimate request form.
primary_functions: Explain the selected service in detail, including scope, typical timelines, and what is included.

Provide the interactive cost calculator (e.g., for Custom Home Design) where users can input square footage, style, bedrooms, bathrooms, finish level, and location/ZIP code to receive an estimated build cost.
Allow users to update or recalculate the estimated cost based on changed inputs.
Offer a 'Request Detailed Estimate' or 'Get Full Quote' form that captures name, email, and project description, using the calculators current parameters as context.
Link users to related portfolio projects that illustrate examples of the service in practice.

incoming_params.description: Service slug used to identify which service detail to load.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View custom home portfolio' from Custom Home Design detail
Click 'View renovation examples' from Renovations service detail
Click 'View commercial projects' from Commercial Architecture detail
Click 'Back to Services'

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'slug' query parameter for a specific service
Sharable URL to a specific service detail page

pages.name: Blog
pages.description: Resource center featuring articles on design, construction, sustainability, and related topics.
primary_functions: List blog articles with titles, excerpts, dates, and key tags (e.g., sustainability, green_building).
Allow users to filter articles by topic/tag (including sustainability-related tags) and by publication year (e.g., 2023).
Let users sort or browse articles chronologically or by popularity.
Enable users to click into individual articles on the Article Detail page.
Promote actions like subscribing to updates or exploring related portfolio projects for deeper engagement.

incoming_params.description: Optional article tag (e.g., 'sustainability', 'green_building') to pre-filter articles.
Optional publication year filter (e.g., 2023).
Optional article sorting, such as 'date_new_to_old'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title or 'Read more' link
Click 'View my reading list' link

access_methods.description: Direct URL with optional filters via query parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for a single blog article, with options to save to a reading list.
primary_functions: Display the full article content, including title, author (optional), publication date, and associated tags.
Allow users to save the article to their reading list via a 'Save', 'Add to Reading List', or 'Bookmark' button.
Provide navigation back to the filtered blog list and to next/previous articles.
Offer sharing options (e.g., copy link) for the article to encourage external sharing.
Recommend related sustainability or design articles to keep users engaged.

incoming_params.description: Article slug used to load article details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Articles'
Click 'Next Article'
Click 'Previous Article'
Click 'Go to my reading list' after saving article

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'slug' query parameter from blog listing or reading list

pages.name: Saved Items
pages.description: Central page for a single user to review all saved/favorited projects, plans, and articles (reading list).
primary_functions: Show a consolidated list of all saved items, grouped or filterable by type (Projects, Plans, Articles).
Allow users to open any saved project, plan, or article, taking them back to its detail page.
Let users remove items from their saved list for simple management.
Indicate item metadata such as type, date saved, and key specs (e.g., cost, size) where relevant.
Provide quick navigation back to Portfolio, Plans, and Blog to continue browsing from saved context.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for saved item type: 'project', 'plan', 'article', or 'testimonial'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved project item
Click a saved plan item
Click a saved article item
Click a saved testimonial item (if supported)
Click 'Browse more projects'
Click 'Browse more plans'
Click 'Browse more articles'

access_methods.description: Direct URL with optional type filter parameter

pages.name: Testimonials
pages.description: Collection of client testimonials with filters to help users find stories relevant to their project type and budget.
primary_functions: List testimonial summaries with project context such as project type (e.g., urban_infill), budget, and key highlight quotes.
Allow users to filter testimonials by project type/context (urban_infill, city_lot, etc.) and budget bands (including high-budget ranges above $800,000).
Enable users to search or scan summaries for mentions of themes like communication or timeline.
Allow users to click any testimonial summary to open the full testimonial on the Testimonial Detail page.
Provide links from testimonials to related portfolio projects where appropriate.

incoming_params.description: Optional testimonial project type preset (e.g., 'commercial').
Optional context preset (e.g., 'urban_infill', 'city_lot').
Optional minimum budget preset for testimonials.
Optional maximum budget preset for testimonials.
Optional sorting preset (e.g., 'budget_high_to_low').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a testimonial summary card or 'Read full story'
Click 'View this project' link attached to a testimonial with a related project
Click 'I want a similar experience' CTA

access_methods.description: Direct URL access with optional preset filters

pages.name: Testimonial Detail
pages.description: Full view of a single client testimonial, with shareable link functionality for easy reference.
primary_functions: Display the complete testimonial text along with client name (if permitted), project type, budget, and context (e.g., urban infill, high-budget).
Highlight key aspects such as communication quality or project timeline to reassure potential clients.
Provide a 'Share' or 'Copy Link' button that copies the testimonial�19s URL for pasting into messages or forms.
Offer navigation back to the filtered testimonials list and onward to related portfolio projects.
Encourage users to get in touch with a call-to-action linking to the Contact page.

incoming_params.description: Testimonial URL slug used to load testimonial details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all testimonials'
Click 'View related project' link
Click 'Discuss a similar project' CTA; passes testimonial URL into contact page for context

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'slug' query parameter from testimonials list or saved items
Sharable URL which can be copied using the share/copy feature

pages.name: Contact & Consultations
pages.description: Unified page for general inquiries and booking in-studio consultations, including scheduling for custom home discussions.
primary_functions: Provide a general inquiry form where users can enter their contact details and a message, including pasting links (e.g., a specific testimonial URL).
Offer a prominent 'Book In-Studio Consultation' call-to-action that reveals or scrolls to a scheduling interface.
Allow users to select appointment type (e.g., Custom Home Consultation) and choose a date via a date picker.
Enable users to select a specific time slot (e.g., 3:00 PM) and finalize a consultation booking by entering contact details and project notes.
Confirm submission of inquiries and bookings with clear success messaging and next-step expectations.

incoming_params.description: Optional preset inquiry type (e.g., 'general', 'testimonial_reference', 'service_question').
Optional preset appointment type for the consultation scheduler (e.g., 'custom_home_consultation').
Optional testimonial link to include automatically in the inquiry message.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' or logo after submitting a form

access_methods.description: Direct URL access, optionally including preset query parameters
Target destination for 'Contact us' or 'Book consultation' CTAs throughout the site

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background on the firm, its team, and its design philosophy to build trust with prospective clients.
primary_functions: Introduce the firms history, mission, and core values with a focus on quality, communication, and timelines.
Showcase key team members with roles and expertise to humanize the practice.
Highlight credentials, awards, and affiliations relevant to architecture and home building.
Link to Portfolio, Testimonials, and Process pages for users who want to learn more before engaging.
Provide a subtle call-to-action to contact the firm or schedule a consultation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View our work' CTA
Click 'Read client stories'
Click 'Learn about our process'
Click 'Talk with our team' CTA

pages.name: Our Process
pages.description: Step-by-step explanation of how the firm works from initial consultation through design, permitting, and construction.
primary_functions: Outline the phases of engagement (discovery, design, documentation, permitting, construction, post-occupancy) in a clear timeline.
Set expectations on communication practices and project timelines to align with client needs.
Clarify what is required from the client at each stage (e.g., decisions, approvals, budget alignment).
Link to relevant services, portfolio examples, and FAQs for deeper details at each stage.
Encourage users to start the process with a consultation or general inquiry.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click links from individual phases to 'Explore related services'
Click 'See projects completed using this process'
Click 'Read FAQs about timelines and process'
Click 'Start with a consultation' CTA

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Common questions and answers about projects, pricing, timelines, and working with the firm.
primary_functions: Answer frequently asked questions about costs, typical budgets, project timelines, and requirements for custom homes and renovations.
Address common concerns about communication, change orders, and expectations during construction.
Provide quick links to Services, Portfolio, and Contact for users needing more specific information.
Reduce friction for users before they commit to requesting quotes or booking consultations.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click links from answers pointing to relevant services
Click 'See examples in our portfolio'
Click 'Still have questions? Contact us'

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal information describing how user data (e.g., form submissions) is collected, used, and stored.
primary_functions: Explain what personal information is collected through forms, cookies, and analytics tools.
Describe how user data is stored, used, and protected in compliance with applicable regulations.
Clarify user rights regarding their personal information, including how to request changes or deletion.
Provide contact details for privacy-related inquiries.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about privacy' link in the policy

access_methods.description: Direct URL access to the policy

pages.name: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and any information, tools, or content provided.
primary_functions: Define acceptable use of the website, including restrictions and disclaimers.
Explain limitations of liability related to cost estimates, project descriptions, and other informational content.
Describe intellectual property ownership for designs, images, and website content.
Provide information on changes to the terms and how users will be notified.
